message:
feat: add async-native Connection wrapper for Cx capability context

AsyncConnection spawns a dedicated worker thread owning the !Send
Connection and dispatches SQL operations via command channel with
oneshot result delivery. Every async method calls Cx::checkpoint()
before dispatching, ensuring cancel-correctness when the context
has been cancelled. Gated behind the `async-api` feature flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
